title: coprosma ochracea var. typica
intro: Coprosma ochracea var. typica, also known as the copper or golden coprosma, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Coprosma ochracea var. typica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant can be prepared as a herbal remedy through methods such as infusion, decoction, or tincture, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized for therapeutic purposes.
